creator: axel.burwitz@arcor.de
text:
the install process with "pkg_add -r linux-realplayer" stops reporting a conflict with "linux-gtk2-2.6.10" which at the same time is written as "required" in the ports description (and needed for other programs, by the way, and can not be deleted therefore)

Description in www.freebsd.org/ports:
****************************************************************************

Category multimedia

linux-realplayer-10.0.8.805.20060718
    Linux RealPlayer 10 from RealNetworks
    Long description : Sources : Changes : Download
    Maintained by: ports@FreeBSD.org
    Also listed in: audio linux
    Requires: linux-atk-1.9.1, linux-expat-1.95.8, linux-fontconfig-2.2.3_5, linux-glib2-2.6.6, linux-gtk2-2.6.10, linux-jpeg-6b.34, linux-pango-1.8.1, linux-png-1.2.8_2, linux-tiff-3.7.1, linux-xorg-libs-6.8.2_5, linux_base-fc-4_9

****************************************************************************

Output from install process:
****************************************************************************

freebsd# ls

freebsd# make install clean
